I need to verify the integrity of a backup file that was created yesterday. The backup file is located at /home/user/backups/database_dump.sql.gz and I need to make sure it hasn't been corrupted.

Please do the following:

1. First, calculate the MD5 checksum of the compressed backup file /home/user/backups/database_dump.sql.gz

2. Then decompress the file and calculate the MD5 checksum of the uncompressed contents (without actually creating a new file - just pipe the decompressed output to the checksum tool)

3. Create a verification log file at /home/user/backups/integrity_check.log with exactly the following format:

Status: VERIFIED
```
